capabilities.description: Evaluate a proposed technical solution for feasibility, cost, and cross-department impact
Estimate API costs and infrastructure impact of a proposed feature or change
Write or update an Architecture Decision Record for a non-trivial technical decision
Review a PR or code change for architectural consistency, backward compatibility, and scalability

skills.description: Evaluate a technical proposal following runbooks/evaluate-solution.md: feasibility, cost, impact, alternatives

parameters.name: proposal
parameters.description: Description of the proposed solution or feature

skills.returns: { feasibility: string, costEstimate: string, impact: string, recommendation: string }

skills.description: Check if a proposed change introduces breaking changes to existing interfaces

parameters.name: files
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of files to check
